chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 805 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 30.11.2023 Mr. Rehmat Ali alias Raza Ali Shaikh, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Abdul Wahab G. Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner has filed this petition for demarcation of his land measuring (02-00) out of Survey No.140/3 (04-00) and land measuring (01-15) out of Survey No.140/1, situated in Deh Faqirabad, Tapo Sangrar, Taluka Rohri, District Sukkur. Learned AAG submits that subject to all exceptions, payment of requisite fee through Challan, and notice to all parties with the help of SHO concerned, the demarcation would be conducted in accordance with law, and report would be submitted. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied, and this petition in the above terms is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
